variants: Octavia Greaves is a recognized inventor and author, known for her work on the Horizon Latch Actuator. Born in Slatehaven Enclave, she currently resides in Dogwood Star. She is also an active member of the Noonbright Mapmakers, a society dedicated to exploring and charting the uncharted. Through her work and collaborations, she continues to make a significant impact in her community.

Her passion for untangling complexities and pioneering new designs is evident in all her endeavors. Octavia's journey is marked by her commitment to innovation and exploration.
